caption: In a studio setting, a man with glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and gold suspenders sits before a black microphone. He wears over-ear headphones and a distinctive light-colored, textured wig. In the background, a woman with bright pink hair wears a green dress, and a sign reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS." A framed logo featuring a shield is visible on the wall. On-screen graphics display the text "BOSS TALK 101" and a logo that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST." As the sequence progresses, the man initially looks forward, then raises his right hand to adjust his wig, momentarily touching the top of his head before lowering his arm. His facial expression remains relatively neutral as he appears to be speaking into the microphone.
